pi_items.verified_value: 6 waveform tracks (e.g., SNUADC/ECG_II, SNUADC/PLETH) and 61 numeric trend tracks (e.g., Solar8000/HR, Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2), plus 2 event tracks.

pi_items.verified_value: Defective Task: Missing setup_task.ps1 and metadata_gt.json
pi_items.source: Local file system inspection shows the task directory is completely missing the setup_task.ps1 script, and the task.json file is truncated at 720 bytes. This makes the task impossible to run or verify properly.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Case 0006 from the VitalDB open dataset. Verification against the actual 0006.vital file from PhysioNet confirms that the total duration of the recording is 01:25:44 (5144.76 seconds), and there are exactly 69 tracks loaded. These consist of 6 high-frequency waveform tracks (type 1, e.g., ECG_II, PLETH) and 61 numeric trend tracks (type 2, e.g., HR, SPO2), alongside 2 event tracks. Importantly, I discovered that the task is completely defective: its task.json file is severely truncated (ending mid-sentence, cutting off the metadata block), and it is missing the vital setup_task.ps1 script required to initialize the environment and generate the metadata_gt.json ground truth file used by verifier.py. Thus, the verifier will always crash, making the task impossible to pass.
